content.en:
Before you know it, another thousand domain yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian was at a critical moment, he was about to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules, and the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions were evolving into the true Supreme Dimensional Rules.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying aura permeated from Ye Tian's body, it was the power that transcended the rules of the dimension, that is, the rules of the supreme dimension.

"Finally understood!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After comprehending the rules of the Supreme Dimension, he completed one of the conditions for attacking the Ninth Realm, and his strength skyrocketed.

Whether it is a multi-dimensional mastery or a supreme master, as long as it is integrated into the rules of the highest dimension, it can burst out with incomparably terrifying attack power.

And after comprehending the rules of the supreme dimension, his insight seems to have stepped into another new level, and even the way of thinking "883" has changed.

Therefore, it would be much easier for him to create the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

"Originally, I thought that it would take a long time to be able to create the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, but now it seems that it should be possible to reduce countless years, or it won't be too long, and I will be sure to create the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Learning. "

Of course.

He also continued to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules, but just relying on the Primal Advent Domain Secret Technique to observe the Primordial Star was not very effective.

"If you can comprehend the primordial star up close, then the efficiency of comprehending the rules of the supreme dimension will be much higher!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Unfortunately, he couldn't.

Not only can he not do it, but even the Ninth Realm can't do it, whoever dares to get close to the Primal Star will definitely be torn apart by the power of the Primordial Star.

However, now that he has comprehended the rules of the Supreme Dimension, he can get close to some ordinary multidimensional stars.

Of course, a very weak multi-dimensional star like the Fog-Eyed Star can be approached in the seventh realm.

Swish!!!

Ye Tian directly escaped into the sixteenth dimension, and he was about to go to a multidimensional star.

The multi-dimensional star he was going to was called Taiwei Star, and the reason why he went to this multidimensional star was entirely because one of the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars that his supreme dimensional domain body echoed was Taiwei Star.

His supreme dimensional domain body needed to absorb the power of these three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars in order to grow, so he had tried to get close to these multi-dimensional stars before, so that he would absorb more multi-dimensional star energy.

As a result, these three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars were all very powerful, and he couldn't get close to them before, otherwise he would be sucked by the multi-dimensional stars and then torn apart.

But now, he was sure to approach these multidimensional objects and save his life.

And this confidence is the supreme dimensional rule.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to Tai Weixing.

From afar, he sensed the coercion of Tai MSI.

Still, he moved on, using the rules of the Supreme Dimension to protect himself against the power of Tai MSI.

Gradually, he approached Tai Wei Xing, and he could directly draw the power of Tai Wei Xing from here.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian urged the star aperture corresponding to the Tai MS in the high-dimensional domain body to start absorbing the energy of the Tai MS.

Rumble!!!!!

Majestic energy poured into his body and began to grow his supreme dimensional domain.

At this time, his efficiency in absorbing the energy of Tai MSI was a thousand times or even ten thousand times that of the past.

In the following years, Ye Tian cultivated here, absorbing the energy of Tai Weixing.

Although Tai Weixing is powerful, this multi-dimensional star body is not special, and there will be no Eighth Realm or even the Ninth Realm to cultivate here.

If it is a multi-dimensional star like the Fog Pluto, then there will definitely be a ninth realm trying to get close, and the breath of that multi-dimensional star can temper the soul will, and if it absorbs its energy, the effect of refining the soul will will will be even better.

However, the energy of the misty pluto is enough to instantly kill the eighth realm where the soul will reaches the sixteenth dimension, and no eighth realm dares to approach, otherwise it will directly seek death.

Time passes.

Ye Tian had been cultivating here, and a thousand Domain Yuan years had passed in the blink of an eye, and he had also absorbed a large amount of Tai Weixing energy.

However, this little bit of Tai MSI energy he absorbed is simply not worth mentioning for the entire Tai MSI.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!!

A special thing suddenly condensed in the star aperture corresponding to Tai Weixing, and countless energies were absorbed, gradually turning into a mark.

"Too micro imprint!"

And with the emergence of this Taiwei mark, Ye Tian's supreme dimensional domain body suddenly skyrocketed, and his body became even stronger.....

"The Aperture of the Astral is Complete, the Multi-Dimensional Astral Imprint, "

Ye Tian finally found the cultivation method of the supreme dimensional domain body, not directly absorbing all the multi-dimensional astral energy, but refining one star aperture after another, just now he cultivated the Taiwei star aperture to the consummation realm, condensing the Taiwei imprint.

At this time, he could be regarded as cultivating the supreme dimensional domain to the beginning.

One of the benefits of condensing the Taiwei imprint is that he can communicate more closely with the Tai MS, and he can even absorb the energy of the Tai MS to replenish himself when fighting.

And as he continued to study, he sensed a supreme domain secret technique from the Taiwei Seal—the Taiwei Starlight.

Starlight increases its speed and reduces a portion of its attacks.

"The Dimensional Domain will come with a Domain Body Secret Technique, I originally thought that the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body does not have a Domain Body Secret Technique, but I didn't expect that the Domain Body Secret Technique of the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body can only be obtained by cultivating the Star Aperture to perfection. "

"One star aperture corresponds to one Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique, doesn't this mean that I will have more than three hundred Supreme Domain Body Secret Techniques?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Suddenly.

He thought that among his three hundred and sixty-five star apertures, there was also a corresponding primal star, if he cultivated the primordial star aperture to perfection, wouldn't he be able to obtain the corresponding Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique, and maybe it would help him comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules!

But 2.9 It's a pity that he can't get close to the Primordial Star now, otherwise he would have gone to the Primordial Star a long time ago.

"Cultivating a star aperture to the fullest, I can not only obtain the Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique, but I can also improve my strength, so let's focus on cultivating the star aperture next!"

Swish!

He left the MSI and went to another multidimensional star.

Among the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars, there were nearly a hundred multi-dimensional stars comparable to Taiwei Star, and he could completely cultivate all of these more than 100 star objects to perfection.

When the time comes, his strength will inevitably skyrocket, even if he doesn't comprehend the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, he may be able to be close to the Eighth Realm invincible.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to one of the multi-dimensional stars, the Desolate Dragon Star.

Subsequently, he began to absorb the energy of the Desolate Dragon Star to cultivate his Desolate Dragon Star Aperture.
